heading: Learn More
body:
- To learn more about Data Modeling in MongoDB and the flexible schema
  model, see [Data Modeling Introduction](manual/core/data-modeling-introduction).

- To learn more about databases and collections, see
  [Databases and Collections](manual/core/databases-and-collections).

- To learn more about embedding related data in a single document, see
  [Embedded Data Models](manual/data-modeling)
